name: 省系统扫码登录服务端

blocks.name: 自定义代码块
blocks.desc: 导入socket

inputs.name: 自定义代码块
inputs.value:
import socket
#创建socket对象
sock = socket.socket()
#绑定端口
sock.bind(('127.0.0.1',int(端口号)))
#print("端口号：",int(端口号))
logger.info("端口号：{}".format(int(端口号)), exc_info=True)
#开始监听
sock.listen(5)

inputs.display: 启用循环正常结束后执行

blocks.name: 打开浏览器
blocks.template: 打开浏览器,并返回对象到{{outPut}}

blocks.name: 自定义代码块
blocks.desc: 监听客户端

inputs.name: 自定义代码块
inputs.value:
# 常驻监听
# 等待用户连接，形成阻塞
conn_socket,address = sock.accept()
# 接收客户端消息内容
data = conn_socket.recv(4096)
print(data.decode('UTF8'))
任务数据字典 = data.decode('UTF8')
print("任务数据字典：",任务数据字典)
print(type(任务数据字典))
字典=sendiRPA.Json.jsonLoads(content=任务数据字典)
print("字典：",字典)
print(type(字典))
用户账号 = 字典['useraccount']
print("用户账号：",用户账号)
try:
    组织机构 = 字典['department']
except Exception:
    组织机构 = ''
print("组织机构：",组织机构)

inputs.name: 自定义代码块
inputs.value:
import requests
import json
登录用户名 = 用户账号
登录响应码 = "0"
登录描述 = "登录失败，该用户没有绑定省账号"
post_json = json.dumps({"userName":登录用户名,"code":登录响应码,"desc":登录描述})
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
print(post_json)
#测试环境
#reponse = requests.post("http://10.194.252.212:8110/gsim-web/scanCode/scanCallBack",headers=headers,data = post_json)
reponse = requests.post("http://10.194.252.94:8090/gsimGateway/gsim-web/scanCode/scanCallBack",headers=headers,data = post_json)
print("reponse.text:",reponse.text)

error_info.error_msg: 找不到自定义组件【else】,请下载对应的组件包
